name: Worn Tools
description: Chipped but serviceable. A farmer works a little faster.

name: Sturdy Axe
description: A good axe makes short work of tall trees.

name: Miner's Pick
description: Balanced and sharp — stone yields more readily.

name: Iron Scythe
description: A keen blade that brings in the harvest in half the time.

name: Masterwork Pick
description: Forged by a true master — it bites stone like timber.

name: Leather Garb
description: Tough hides that turn the worst of the weather and the work.

name: Chainmail
description: Interlocking rings that keep a colonist whole through danger.

name: Plate Armor
description: Heavy and protective — little gets through tempered steel.

name: Warden's Plate
description: Armor of the old wardens — its bearer feels invincible.

name: Scholar's Quill
description: Ideas flow faster from a fine pen.

name: Merchant's Ledger
description: Every deal recorded, every advantage pressed.

name: Lucky Charm
description: Its bearer always seems to keep their spirits up.

name: Ancient Talisman
description: A relic that wards both body and mind.

name: Crown of Ages
description: Worn by leaders of forgotten empires. None who carry it despair.

name: Timber Bundle
description: Seasoned wood, ready for the workshop.

name: Iron Ingot
description: A bar of smelted iron — the backbone of good gear.

name: Ancient Alloy
description: A metal whose making was lost to time. Stronger than steel.

name: Spirit Essence
description: A captured wisp of something not entirely of this world.

name: Harvest Idol
description: A carved figure that seems to bless the fields.

name: Forge Totem
description: Set by the kilns, it lends strength to every smith.

name: Beacon Stone
description: A watch-stone that warns of danger long before it arrives.

name: Relic of Prosperity
description: Its presence lifts the whole colony's heart.

name: Eternal Engine
description: An impossible machine that never stops turning.

name: World Seed
description: A shard of first creation that whispers endless secrets.

name: Steel Ingot
description: Carbon-tempered iron — stronger, lighter, the stuff of modern industry.

name: Circuit Board
description: Etched copper and silicon — the nervous system of every modern machine.

name: Fusion Cell
description: A sealed sliver of caged starfire, humming with contained power.

name: Chainsaw
description: A snarling blade that fells in seconds what once took an hour.

name: Power Drill
description: Diamond-tipped and motor-driven — stone gives way like sand.

name: Auto-Harvester
description: One operator reaps what a whole crew once did.

name: Kevlar Vest
description: Woven fibre that stops what steel never could.

name: Powered Exosuit
description: Hydraulic muscle and armour plate — its wearer shrugs off the impossible.

name: Sentinel Power Armor
description: A walking fortress. Few threats in any era can touch its bearer.

name: Research Terminal
description: A personal console that turns any thinker into a one-person institute.

name: Morale Broadcaster
description: A pocket device that pipes in music, news and good cheer all day.

name: Neural Implant
description: A mind laced with circuitry — thought itself runs faster and calmer.

name: Automation Hub
description: A control node that drives idle machines across the whole colony.

name: Automated Med-Bay
description: Tireless surgeons of steel keep every colonist on their feet.

name: Stabilised Fusion Core
description: A perfected reactor heart that pours out power for a whole settlement.

name: Orbital Uplink
description: A direct line to the satellites — the sum of human knowledge, on tap.

name: Planetary Shield Generator
description: A dome of force no raider, beast or storm has ever broken.
